prompt: Which vulnerability is most likely present in this code?
explanation: The `session` cookie is created without the HttpOnly flag, so client-side JavaScript can read it (e.g. `document.cookie`) and an XSS bug could exfiltrate the session — Sensitive Cookie Without HttpOnly Flag (CWE-1004). Note Secure IS set here, so 'without Secure' is wrong. Fix: set HttpOnly on session cookies.
